items.title: Amazon looking to buy Globalstar, the company behind Apple's SOS via Satellite

items.title: The world added 692 GW of renewables in 2025 - here's what it means
items.summary: The world added a massive 692 gigawatts (GW) of renewable power in 2025, pushing total global capacity to 5,149 GW, according to a new report from the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA).

items.title: Apple Sports Now Lets You Follow Your Favorite 2026 FIFA World Cup Teams
items.summary: Apple today updated the Sports app for iPhone to add more 2026 FIFA World Cup content. Soccer fans are now able to view complete tournament groupings and follow their favorite national teams in the app. This is the first 48-team World Cup...

items.title: Apple rolls out critical iOS 18 update for iPhones that didn't upgrade [Now available]
items.summary: Apple released an iOS 18 update to patch a dangerous security hack - DarkSword - on iPhones that haven't upgraded to iOS 26. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: The reputation of troubled YC startup Delve has gotten even worse
items.summary: Delve faces new allegations that it violated the open source license of its customer, Sim.ai, by taking the customers's tool and passing it off as its own.

items.title: Nvidia market share in China falls to less than 60% - Chinese chip makers deliver 1.65 million AI GPUs as the government pushes data centers to use domestic chips
items.summary: Local chip makers take 41% of the Chinese AI semiconductor market, while Nvidia's market share falls to 55% - down from the company's claimed high of 95%.
